name: Shenzhen Leaguer Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Leaguer Co., Ltd. produces and sells packaging products in China and internationally. The company develops packaging materials; designs packaging concepts; produces and sells cosmetic and food plastic packaging products; designs and manufactures technological equipment and molds; offers cosmetic additives and cosmetics; designs battery packaging products; and designs and manufactures automobile light weighting products. It is also involved in packaging recycling and RFID tag customization activities; and offers multilayer tubes, injection products, blowing bottles, injection blowing-molds, and coating and vacuum metalizing products. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Beauty Star Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Leaguer Co., Ltd. in January 2021. Shenzhen Leaguer Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 is based in Shenzhen, China.
